title: Better Sculk
description: Adds 2 new types of Sculk to reward the farming of valuable mobs.
body:
Preview video: https://youtu.be/VNq8o9RQBL0

The Better Sculk mod is a small mod that adds 2 new Sculk blocks that can replace the original Sculk block, if a mob that died dropped a high amount of experience. 
It is meant to reward the farming of valuable monsters, by adding 2 new tiers of Sculk that store a higher amount of experience per block.


## Green Sculk
- Drops 2 XP when destroyed.
- Only generated by the Sculk Catalyst.
- Can only replace the Sculk block when being generated.
- Only spawns if the mob that died dropped **at least 10 experience**.
- Cannot be insta-mined by unenchanted hoes.

## Pink Sculk
- Drops 4 XP when destroyed.
- Only generated by the Sculk Catalyst.
- Can only replace Green Sculk when being generated.
- Only spawns if the mob that died dropped **at least 20 experience**.
- Can only be insta-mined by using Haste in combination with hoes enchanted with Efficiency.
